para.verbatim: return human readable name of subclass
return human readable name of subclass in plural form
return name of subtype for serialization purposes
clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
return several info lines that can better describe the object in the UI
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object
sets given point cloud to this, and returns back previous mesh of this; does not touch selection
returns variable point cloud, if const point cloud is needed use `pointCloud()` instead

Generated from: MR::ObjectPoints Aliases: ChangePointCloudNormalsAction.Obj, ChangePointCloudPointsAction.Obj, std_shared_ptr_ObjectPoints, ChangeOneNormalInCloudAction.Obj, ChangeOnePointInCloudAction.Obj, ChangePointCloudAction.Obj, ChangePointPointSelectionAction.Obj
an object that stores a points
